summary: Iteration 4 — Frontend-only regression for Payment-Gateway (Tripay) PRD compliance. All 15 review checkpoints PASS. Verified: 6 new legal pages (/privacy-policy, /terms-and-conditions, /cancellation-policy, /refund-policy, /house-rules, /payment-information) each render correct H1, breadcrumb, Book Now CTA (https://pelangihomestay.com/book, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer), supporting text, per-page SEO (title/desc/canonical/og/twitter), BreadcrumbList JSON-LD, and global LodgingBusiness JSON-LD from SiteLayout. About page shows H1 'Rumah Hangat di Jantung Bedugul sejak 2012.' + 2012 + 18 kamar + 10 Standard + 8 Cottage in bold + Visi/Misi/Kenapa memilih Pelangi + fact strip. Footer renders 4 columns (Jelajahi/Informasi/Legal/Hubungi) + brand column, all required links present, NO Admin link. /sitemap.xml served 200 application/xml with all 16 URLs (legal + main). /robots.txt served 200 with Disallow: /admin + Sitemap: entry. Regression: /rooms, /faq, and admin login (admin@pelangihomestay.com → /admin/dashboard) still work.

issues: Existing pre-iteration noise: /api/auth/me returns 401 on public pages because AuthProvider mounts globally. Not new; documented in iterations 1-3.

verification_results.lodging_schema_home: PASS — @type=LodgingBusiness, name=Pelangi Homestay, numberOfRooms=18, telephone=+6285119459269, email=pelangihomestay9@gmail.com, priceRange='IDR 175.000 – IDR 225.000', address.addressLocality=Baturiti, addressRegion=Bali, postalCode=82191, geo.latitude=-8.276, geo.longitude=115.164, openingHours 07:00-22:00.
verification_results.lodging_schema_on_every_legal_page: PASS — LodgingBusiness JSON-LD found in <head> on all 6 legal pages (rendered by SiteLayout).
verification_results.privacy_policy: PASS — H1 'Kebijakan Privasi'; sections Pengumpulan Data, Cookies, Keamanan Data, Hak Pengguna verified; BreadcrumbList JSON-LD (len=2); canonical set; Book Now CTA opens https://pelangihomestay.com/book target=_blank; supporting text present.
verification_results.terms_and_conditions: PASS — H1 'Syarat & Ketentuan'; sections Reservasi, Pembayaran, Check-in, Check-out, Force Majeure all present; BreadcrumbList JSON-LD OK.
verification_results.cancellation_policy: PASS — H1 'Kebijakan Pembatalan'; Cara/Waktu/Biaya Pembatalan + No-Show sections found; BreadcrumbList JSON-LD OK.
verification_results.refund_policy: PASS — H1 'Kebijakan Refund'; Prinsip Refund, Metode, Estimasi, Cara Mengajukan sections found; visual confirmation via screenshot; links to /cancellation-policy inline.
verification_results.house_rules: PASS — H1 'Aturan Menginap'; Check-in/out, Visitor, Damage sections found. NOTE: 'Smoking', 'Noise', 'Pet' section labels use Indonesian wording (e.g., 'Merokok', 'Ketenangan/Jam Tenang', 'Hewan Peliharaan') — the equivalent semantics ARE present in the page; the English keywords in the test list simply do not match verbatim (per review request footnote screenshot verification is sufficient).
verification_results.payment_information: PASS — H1 'Informasi Pembayaran'; Transfer Bank, VA, QRIS, e-Wallet, Tripay, HTTPS mentions all found; alur reservasi sections + Refund Policy link render.
verification_results.about_page: PASS — H1 'Rumah Hangat di Jantung Bedugul sejak 2012.'; body contains 2012, 18, '10 Standard Room', '8 Cottage'; Visi + Misi cards render; 'Kenapa memilih Pelangi?' section with 6 items (WiFi/Sarapan/Parkir included); fact strip present. Minor: strict substring check for 'Berdiri' returned false because the label is uppercase 'BERDIRI' due to tracking-widest uppercase CSS — cosmetic only, section is visible.
verification_results.footer_new_layout: PASS (visual) — 4 columns visible: Jelajahi (Rooms, Facilities, Gallery, Restaurant, Explore Bedugul, Blog), Informasi (About Us, Payment Information, House Rules, FAQ, Contact), Legal (Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Cancellation Policy, Refund Policy), Hubungi (address, WA 0851-1945-9269, email pelangihomestay9@gmail.com, Reception 07:00-22:00 WITA) + brand column. NO 'Admin' link anywhere in footer. NOTE: page.evaluate() queries against <footer> returned 0 anchors intermittently (SPA hydration timing), but full-page screenshot confirms all links render correctly.
verification_results.per_page_seo_meta: PASS — Each legal page updates: document.title (e.g., 'Kebijakan Privasi — Pelangi Homestay'), meta[name=description], link[rel=canonical] to full URL, og:title/og:description/og:image/og:type/og:url/og:site_name, twitter:card=summary_large_image + twitter:title/description/image, robots=index,follow.
verification_results.breadcrumb_jsonld_per_page: PASS — Every legal page renders a BreadcrumbList JSON-LD with itemListElement.length=2 (Home + current page).
verification_results.sitemap_xml: PASS — /sitemap.xml → 200, Content-Type application/xml, contains all 6 legal URLs + / /rooms /facilities /gallery /restaurant /explore-bedugul /about /blog /contact /faq (16 total).
verification_results.robots_txt: PASS — /robots.txt → 200 with 'Disallow: /admin', 'Disallow: /admin/', and 'Sitemap: https://pelangihomestay.com/sitemap.xml' present. (Cloudflare Managed content signals block is prepended by CDN — non-blocking.)
verification_results.regression_rooms: PASS — /rooms renders Standard + Cottage + IDR 175 (from CMS content).

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (from iter 3 — not re-run this iteration per instruction)
critical_code_review_comments: robots.txt is served with Content-Type: text/plain (not application/xml, which is correct for robots). Content is preceded by Cloudflare's Managed Content Signals block, then the custom rules — this is fine and standard.

SEO Seo.jsx uses a single <script id='page-jsonld'> element and REMOVES it on every navigation before adding a new one. That means only ONE JSON-LD block from Seo.jsx (BreadcrumbList) is present per page. The LodgingBusiness schema is rendered separately by <LodgingSchema /> in SiteLayout as an inline dangerouslySetInnerHTML <script> — so both coexist correctly (verified via document.querySelectorAll test).

LegalLayout.jsx: BreadcrumbList JSON-LD is constructed with items only when b.to is set. Since Legal pages pass `breadcrumb=[{label:'...'}]` (no 'to'), the current page's `item` URL is intentionally omitted — Schema.org still accepts this. Consider always emitting the current page's URL for stricter validation.
Rooms and several existing pages do not render an <h1> element in the DOM (result h1=null from evaluate). Not new to this iteration but flags an accessibility/SEO weakness for future clean-up.

About.jsx renders a duplicate visual pattern: 'Values' cards (Tulus/Lestari/Hangat) sit below the 'Kenapa memilih Pelangi?' 6-card grid — both use identical styling. Consider merging or differentiating visually for polish.

sitemap.xml uses hardcoded https://pelangihomestay.com/* — correct for production canonical URL. Good, but note the preview domain will return a canonical mismatch (canonical points to preview origin via Seo.jsx dynamic origin, sitemap points to prod). This is expected behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRD-compliance (Payment Gateway) content is fully live and SEO-ready. Six legal pages share LegalLayout.jsx wrapper (SEO + Breadcrumb + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD + Book Now CTA). Global LodgingBusiness schema is emitted once in SiteLayout.jsx. Static /sitemap.xml + /robots.txt live in /app/frontend/public/. Footer.jsx uses lg:grid-cols-5 (brand col-span-2 + 4 nav columns). No Admin link. Backend not touched this iteration — iter-3 backend regression (34/34 pytest) remains authoritative.
